artifacts.summary: Session C progress: added irreflexive_mcs_has_strict_future lemma, proved unreachable cases via Temporal 4 closure, improved CantorApplication structure

partial_progress.details: Phase 6 (strict density) partially implemented. Added irreflexive_mcs_has_strict_future lemma. Proved unreachable case in NoMaxOrder. Core sorries remain for reflexive MCS case and strict timeline integration.

completion_data.completion_summary: Phase 6 progress: added helper lemma for irreflexive MCS strict futures, proved several cases unreachable via Temporal 4 closure, improved proof structure. Remaining sorries need well-founded iteration approach.
